results.title: Thousands to join Prague protest in support of Czech Television and Radio
results.description: Demonstrators in Prague will march against proposed changes to Czech public media funding, with a petition to be delivered to the government.

results.title: Customers spending less as businesses pinched by Iran war crisis
results.description: Australians are spending less despite the worst impacts of the Middle East fuel crisis in the past, new data has revealed.

results.title: Hyderabad Traffic Diversion
results.description: హైదరాబాద్ మెహదీపట్నం, పీవీఎన్ఆర్ ఎక్స్‌ప్రెస్‌వే పరిసరాల్లో మే 24, 25 తేదీల్లో భారీగా ట్రాఫిక్ ఆంక్షలు విధించారు. స్కైవాక్ పనుల నేపథ్యంలో పోలీసులు ప్రకటించిన పూర్తి రూట్ మ్యాప్, హెల్ప్‌లైన్ నంబర్ వివరాలు వెల్లడించారు.

results.title: 'Slow Poison’: Arvind Kejriwal Explodes Over Fuel Hikes, Warns Petrol May Hit Rs 150
results.description: Fuel prices in India have surged for the third time in 15 days, increasing by Rs 4 to Rs 5 per litre, alongside a significant rise in gas cylinder costs. Amidst fuel shortages and long lines at petrol stations, Aam Aadmi Party leader Arvind Kejriwal criticised the central government for these hikes, labelling them as a “slow poison.”

results.title: Aishwarya Rai Urges Aspiring Actors to Stay Authentic in ‘Manufactured’ World
results.description: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan has shared advice for aspiring actors entering the film industry, encouraging them to stay true to themselves and avoid getting caught up in a world she described as increasingly “manufactured.” Speaking to Brut India during her appearance at the Cannes Film Festival, Aishwarya reflected on the artistic journey and said that creativity [...] The post Aishwarya Rai Urges Aspiring Actors to Stay Authentic in ‘Manufactured’ World appeared first on ANC .

results.title: Toledo makes PCAP All-Filipino Conference southern group finals
results.description: The Toledo Xignex Trojans punched their return ticket to the Professional Chess Association of the Philippines (PCAP) All-Filipino Conference Southern Division Finals after sweeping the Cavite Spartans in dominant fashion on Saturday night, May 23.

results.title: Political Marriages Are Never Easy: The Tonse/Pamodzi Alliance Will Rise- Dr Mwelwa
results.description: By Dr Mwelwa Alliances are rarely born in comfort. They emerge through sacrifice, compromise, urgency, and pressure, especially when history demands political unity. The Tonse/Pamodzi Alliance was formed days before nominations, not after years of planning, consultation, harmonization, and structured political consolidation. To expect immediate perfection in such circumstances is unrealistic because coalition politics everywhere [...] The post Political Marriages Are Never Easy: The Tonse/Pamodzi Alliance Will Rise- Dr Mwelwa first appeared on The Zambian Observer .

results.title: Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari Warns People Against Stepping Out After 11 AM
results.description: #ପ ୍ରବଳ_ଖରା #୧୧ଟ ାରେ_ପରେ_ଘରୁ_ବାହାରନି ପ୍ରବଳ ଖରାକୁ ନେଇ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ରାଜସ୍ବମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୁରେଶ ପୂଜାରୀଙ୍କ ପରାମର୍ଶ ୧୧ଟାରେ ପରେ ଘରୁ ବାହାରନି। ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ଯାଏଁ ଶ୍ରମିକମାନେ ବାହାରେ କାମ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ମନା ରହିଛି। ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଅତି ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ସ୍ଥଳେ ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବାହାରକୁ ଯାଉଛନ୍ତି ପାଣି, ଓଦା ଗାମୁଛା ଆଦି ନେଇକି ଯାଆନ୍ତୁ। ୨ ତାରିଖ ଯାଏଁ ଏମିତି ଖରା ରହିବ। Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari has advised people not to step out of their homes after 11 AM due to the prevailing severe heatwave conditions. He said labourers have been prohibited from working outdoors between 11 AM and 3 PM as part of precautionary measures. People going out for urgent work during these hours have been advised to carry drinking water and a wet Gamucha (traditional cotton towel) to avoid heat-related illness. According to the minister, the intense heat conditions are likely to continue till the 2nd. The advisory has been issued to ensure public safety amid rising temperatures and harsh summer conditions across the state. #HeatwaveAlert_SureshPujari #OdishaHeatwave #SummerSafety #HeatwaveWarning #ExtremeHeat #WorkerSafety #PublicAdvisory #OdishaNews #HeatwavePrecaution_Odisha #OutdoorWorkBan_Odisha #SureshPujari_HeatAlert #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: Dizon: Over 20 trapped in collapsed building in Angeles City
results.description: ANGELES CITY, Pampanga — More than 20 people, most of them construction workers, are believed to be trapped beneath the rubble of the collapsed nine-story building here, Public Works Secretary Vince Dizon said on Sunday. results.title: US overtakes Mauritius to become India’s 2nd largest FDI source as inflows cross $11 billion mark
results.description: The investment landscape is changing. The United States has now claimed the title of India's second-largest foreign investor, overtaking Mauritius. Equity infusions from America more than doubled to exceed $11 billion during the 2025-26 period. While Singapore holds the crown, sectors such as food processing, computer hardware, and shipping are experiencing exciting development.

results.title: 9 States With No State Income Tax — But Living There Isn’t Always Cheap
results.description: If you were surprised to learn how many states don’t charge a state income tax, you’re probably not living in one of them.
